title: Federal Funding — Education Agencies
content:
Education-focused federal sponsors and resources listed by Morgan State ORA on the Funding Sources page:

- U.S. Department of Education (ED) — http://www.ed.gov/
- Education Daily — http://www.educationdaily.com/GE/splash.jsp

Morgan investigators in education research, teacher preparation, and education sciences also use the Institute of Education Sciences (IES) Research Training Programs and DoED HBCU/MSI-specific programs (see opportunity_category_hbcu_msi).
